projects.name: Monument to the Revolution
projects.description: A towering tribute to the workers' struggle. The monument itself struggles to remain upright.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: MONUMENT CONSTRUCTION APPROVED: Soviet Spirit Rendered in Concrete
projects.completionToast: The monument stands. It is made of concrete. Everything is made of concrete.

projects.name: Palace of the Soviets
projects.description: The grandest building never completed in real history. In this timeline, it might actually happen.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: PALACE OF SOVIETS CONSTRUCTION BEGINS: Architecture of the Future Built Today
projects.completionToast: The Palace rises above the settlement. Its shadow covers everything. This is considered a feature.

projects.name: Nuclear Research Program
projects.description: Split the atom for the glory of the Soviet Union. What could possibly go wrong.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: NUCLEAR RESEARCH AUTHORIZED: Peaceful Atom Serves the People
projects.completionToast: The reactor hums. The Geiger counter also hums. This is unrelated.

projects.name: Nuclear Power Plant
projects.description: Cheap, clean energy. The adjectives are used loosely.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: NUCLEAR PLANT CONSTRUCTION: Unlimited Energy for the Workers' Future
projects.completionToast: The plant is operational. Safety reports have been filed. The filing cabinet is lead-lined.

projects.name: Cosmodrome
projects.description: A launch facility for Soviet rockets. The rockets go up. Most of them come back down in the right place.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: COSMODROME APPROVED: Soviet Science Reaches for the Stars
projects.completionToast: The launch pad is ready. The first test rocket has been loaded. The evacuation zone has been drawn. It is quite large.

projects.name: Satellite Communications Network
projects.description: Eyes in the sky. Also ears. The KGB is delighted.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: SATELLITE NETWORK OPERATIONAL: Every Corner of the Union Connected
projects.completionToast: The satellites orbit faithfully. They see everything. Everything is normal.

projects.name: Orbital Space Station
projects.description: A permanent presence in orbit. The workers there are technically still within the Union. Technically.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: ORBITAL STATION CONSTRUCTION BEGINS: Workers' Paradise Extends to the Heavens
projects.completionToast: The station is in orbit. Living conditions are comparable to a communal apartment. This is not a coincidence.

projects.name: Fusion Reactor Prototype
projects.description: Fusion power: always 30 years away, except in the Soviet Union, where timelines are flexible.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: FUSION REACTOR PROTOTYPE APPROVED: Harnessing the Power of Stars
projects.completionToast: The sun in a bottle is lit. The bottle is very, very large. And reinforced.

projects.name: Electromagnetic Mass Driver
projects.description: Launch payloads to orbit without rockets. The physics are sound. The budget is fictional.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: MASS DRIVER CONSTRUCTION: Gravity is a Bourgeois Concept
projects.completionToast: The first payload screams skyward at 8 km/s. The sound is memorable. The neighboring settlement files a noise complaint.

projects.name: Planetary Terraforming Engine
projects.description: Reshape other worlds in the image of the Soviet Union. The paperwork for a building permit on Mars takes 47 forms.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: TERRAFORMING ENGINE APPROVED: Mars Will Know the Five-Year Plan
projects.completionToast: The engine activates. Mars begins to change. The paperwork begins to multiply. The paperwork will outlast Mars.

projects.name: Dyson Swarm
projects.description: Harness the entire output of the Sun for the Soviet Union. Energy independence at a stellar scale. The paperwork is astronomical.
projects.pravdaAnnouncement: DYSON SWARM AUTHORIZED: The Sun Itself Serves the Five-Year Plan
projects.completionToast: The first collectors orbit the sun. The energy is limitless. The committee meeting to allocate it is also limitless.
